name: Guardsman Crossbow
description: Not too long before his demise, King Etbert ordered to form a unit of crossbow-wielding guardsmen. The most skilled Aldwynn bowyers were tasked with providing the weaponry, but they'd managed to produce only a few dozen crossbows before the monarch's death.
descriptionZh: 埃特伯特国王驾崩之前没有多久，下令组建了一支弩兵卫队，并命多位手艺无与伦比的奥尔德文工匠为卫队打造兵器。直到国王离世，工匠也才造出了几十把弩。
